description: ReactiveFamily entry kind (#lzmatmode) is orthogonal to materialization mode: a family's entries are input CELLS (EntryKind.cell — always materialized, any mode) or derived SLOTS (EntryKind.slot — materialized eagerly, or lazily on first read). `spec.entries` gives each key's kind and canonical value. Under lazy, cell entries are present at build (`lazy_present_at_build`) while slot entries stay absent until read; under eager, all entries are present. Reads are mode-independent. Proved as cell_entries_materialized_in_every_mode / slot_entries_deferred_under_lazy.
